title: Gauntlet Policy
description: Schema for the gauntlet.yml policy file that configures a Gauntlet test suite.

version.description: Schema version number for the policy file format.

suite.description: Unique name identifying this test suite.

description.description: Human-readable description of the test suite's purpose.

tut.description: Configuration for the Tool Under Test (TUT) -- the agent being evaluated.

type.description: The type of agent under test (e.g. cli, api, docker).

command.description: Shell command used to invoke the agent.

working_dir.description: Working directory from which the command is executed.

defaults.description: Default values applied to all scenarios unless overridden.

budget_ms.description: Default time budget in milliseconds for each scenario.

scenarios_dir.description: Path to the directory containing scenario YAML files.

world_dir.description: Path to the directory containing world definition YAML files (tools and databases).
